---
name: Documentation issue
about: Something in the docs is wrong, missing, or unclear.
title: ""
labels: ["docs"]
assignees: []
---

## Where

Which page, file, or section?

- File: (e.g., `README.md`, `docs/deploy-govcloud-ec2.md`, a detector's README)
- Heading or line: (link to a permalink if you have one)

## What's wrong

A clear description of the issue: factually incorrect, ambiguous, missing context, broken link, or just confusing.

## Suggested wording

If you have a draft of the corrected text, paste it here. Even a one-line "I'd say X instead of Y" is helpful.

## Audience

Who's affected? (First-time user trying to install? Detector author writing a contribution? 3PAO reading attestation output?)
